allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $installDir = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.sui\\bin"; $extractDir = "$env:TEMP\\sui-extracted"; "Copying binaries..."; Copy-Item "$extractDir\\sui.exe" $installDir -Force; Copy-Item "$extractDir\\move-analyzer.exe" $installDir -Force; Copy-Item "$extractDir\\sui-faucet.exe" $installDir -Force; "Files installed:"; Get-ChildItem $installDir | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})
